metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace by Immy6315 — multi-agent PR reviewer and 5-role engineering org plugins.

plugins.name: gr-reviewer
plugins.description: Multi-agent PR reviewer — runs 7 specialist AI agents in parallel and posts inline GitHub comments.

plugins.name: eng-org
plugins.description: 5-role multi-agent engineering org — EM, Tech Leads, Domain Devs, independent Test agents, specialist Reviewers (architecture / security / performance / standards / observability / indexes), and a system **Architect** that produces versioned ADRs BEFORE any TL decomposes tasks. Drops a complete governance + review pipeline into any project via /eng-org:init. Ships with 9 binding guardrails (G-1..G-9) including visual-parity gate, regression-check.md per task, device-boot smoke for native deps, batch cap, design-divergence registry, and the API contract-parity gate. /eng-org:architect runs an adversarial 3-reviewer loop against an explicit scale brief + banned anti-pattern list + locked tech stack. A portable context layer (AGENTS.md universal entry point, machine-readable eng-org.json manifest, dated DECISIONS.md ADR logs, and a multi-project scaffolder via /eng-org:new-project) lets any AI or engineer pick a project up cold. New in 0.6.0: the /eng-org:graphyfy skill draws idempotent Mermaid linking-graphs (module/layer deps, domain & data-model relationships, requirement→task DAG, role pipeline) into governance/graphs/. New in 0.10.0: /eng-org:sync pushes the shared governance context to a git remote for cross-machine sync — repo-guarded (self-skips when no context repo exists) and auto-wired into /eng-org:em-intake (on new REQ) and /eng-org:merge-readiness (on readiness). New in 0.11.0: G-7 API contract-parity gate + G-8 contract registry — the backend analogue of the visual-parity gate. The test-integration agent captures a normalized before/after response snapshot per touched endpoint (zero-dep contract-diff.mjs strips volatile fields), so unregistered response-contract drift BLOCKs merge and a private-field leak on a public/unauthenticated endpoint is an unconditional block. New in 0.12.0: Mode L autopilot — an autonomous build-until-done loop. /eng-org:autopilot runs the G-9 clarity gate (8-item scorecard incl. feasibility + dependency pre-flight, interview until 8/8, authority grants, architect plan preview → human approval); then scripts/autopilot-driver.sh re-invokes /eng-org:autopilot-iterate in a fresh context per iteration (one pipeline stage of one REQ), with decide-and-log/park on ambiguity (never asks mid-loop), a fingerprint circuit breaker against doom loops, per-milestone retros whose learnings bind only after validation, and an immutable SPEC/acceptance-criteria zone against reward hacking. Merges stay human. New in 0.13.0: GR deep-review inside /eng-org:run-reviews — the gr multi-specialist engine reviews each REQ's diff in local-diff mode (gr review --range base..HEAD; any base branch, no GitHub PR, no token, nothing posted), with zero-install auto-resolution of the gr binary via scripts/gr-ensure.sh (no gr-reviewer plugin required; graceful skip when offline), a mandatory TL evidence-verification gate over every GR finding (dispositions in gr-review.md, enforced by merge-readiness), and a learning loop appending confirmed findings to governance/MISTAKES.md. New in 0.14.0: Tier 1 token-optimization v2 — report diet v2 (verdict-carrying reports capped at ~40-line prose on GREEN/APPROVE, unbounded on RED/BLOCK; evidence paths mandatory in frontmatter; TL forced-sampling audit every REQ; dev-reports/gr-review/em-summary/retro/merge-readiness exempt), incremental fix-iterations v2 (scripts/invalidation.mjs computes transitive-import-closure BFS to pin unaffected tiers as GREEN@<sha> (pinned) with audit trail; reviewer-security/test-regression/G-7/GR always re-run; mistakes_sha256 hash-guards MISTAKES.md staleness), context pack v2 (dedicated context-packer agent authors verbatim tag-sliced extracts per REQ; GUARDRAILS.md always included whole; exclusion manifest mandatory; raw-doc escape hatch logged; rotating canary reviewer reads raw and files pack_audit verdict; test-regression and GR always read raw). New in 0.15.0: review-pipeline hardening + token diet round-2 — mechanical verdict-lint (scripts/verdict-lint.mjs parses every TASK-*-review-*.md, derives the verdict from the max confirmed finding severity, and hard-errors on mismatch in run-reviews + merge-readiness; SKIP-with-note stubs supported), MISTAKES.md learning-loop automation (scripts/mistakes-gate.mjs enforces a dated-heading entry grammar and blocks merge-readiness when a REQ's confirmed findings produced no MISTAKES entry), reviewer fan-out consolidation driven by an empirical overlap audit (new reviewer-governance + reviewer-domain-validator roles; security checks folded into the surviving roster; reviewer-indexes demoted to escalation-only Step 2b), fix-iteration focused re-review (Step 4b re-runs only the reviewers whose findings the fix touched, with explicit RESOLVED/UNRESOLVED re-verdicts per finding), and a quality-neutral token-reduction bundle (agent-file context diet round-2 with byte census, model pins — haiku on context-packer/test-regression with an explicit never-downgrade list — and report-template slimming). New in 0.16.0: measured intelligence jump (bench Intelligence Index 79.71 → 91.31, first release to clear the ≥89 target) from a multi-candidate calibration program — extraction-layer verdict enforcement (scripts/verdict-lint.mjs derives category + WARN ceilings from finding text so over-blocking is fixed where the input is mis-classified, not just in reviewer prose), a mechanical MISTAKES.md learning gate (scripts/mistakes-gate.mjs), two new reviewer roles (reviewer-governance + reviewer-domain-validator) with severity-tier calibration examples, an emit-time output-cap module (scripts/output-cap.mjs) with a frozen tier parameter (config/output-cap-parameter.json), and reviewer-depth increases across the roster. verdict_accuracy .636 → .939, precision .528 → .864, recall 1.000 held, guardrail 100% held. New in 0.17.0: the "best-plugin" Phase-1 process layer (Tracks A+B+C+G) — a mandatory TRD design stage before code (templates/trd.template.md freezes the 5-section Ratio TRD verbatim + eng-org extensions E1–E4, a mandatory Mermaid diagram, scripts/trd-lint.mjs, /eng-org:trd sequenced between tl-analyze and tl-assign with an EM approval gate); a design-principles curriculum (governance/DESIGN_PRINCIPLES.md, 15 principles as def→why→smell→fix→when-NOT, scripts/design-lint.mjs, Dev self-checklist + reviewer design-axis); an anti-rewrite / scope-discipline guard (scripts/scope-explosion-guard.mjs blocks >1.5× the TRD change-budget, GUARDRAILS G-10 "Boy Scout not Demolition", full rewrites human-gated); and four DX commands (/eng-org:status, /eng-org:why, /eng-org:ship, /eng-org:blockers). Bench: no quality regression vs 0.16.0 — Intelligence Index 91.31 → 94.63, every sub-metric equal-or-better, output tokens −6.1%.
